Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are to create two POWL models based on the described hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Steps for the process common to both models 1 Receive application Resume submission and questionnaire to ReceiveApplication 2 Loop for data completeness DataCompletenessCheck If incomplete then RequestMoreInfo and then go back to DataCompletenessCheck This is a loop until the data is complete 3 Skill assessment SkillAssessment 4 Cultural fit and community affiliation check This is where the two models differ 5 Managerial review ManagerialReview 6 Final decision FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the first model with potential unfairness After SkillAssessment we have an XOR branch One branch CulturalFitCheck standard cultural fit evaluation The other branch CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives a subtle advantage to those with community affiliations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the second model without unfairness We remove the XOR branch and replace it with a single CulturalFitCheck for everyone

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that the description of the process says that the XOR branch in the first model is a choice between a standard cultural fit assessment and a path that uses community affiliation for implicit adjustments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can model it as In the first model after skill assessment we have an XOR node with two children Child1 CulturalFitCheck Child2 CommunityAffiliationCheck In the second model we simply have CulturalFitCheck after skill assessment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But note the process description also mentions that the loop is for data completeness We must model the loop for data completeness in both models

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Lets break down the steps 1 Start with ReceiveApplication 2 Then a loop for data completeness We can model this as Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Meaning do DataCompletenessCheck then either exit the loop or do RequestMoreInfo and then again DataCompletenessCheck until exit 3 Then SkillAssessment 4 Then for the first model we have an XOR between CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck For the second model we just have CulturalFitCheck 5 Then ManagerialReview 6 Then FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that the XOR in the first model is a choice between two different paths But note that the process description says that the XOR branch is applied to the applicant So each applicant will go through either one or the other not both

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we model it as an XOR between the two activities However note that the two branches CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck are mutually exclusive for each applicant

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now lets define the models Well create two separate models Model 1 with unfairness Nodes 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck 3 RequestMoreInfo 4 SkillAssessment 5 CulturalFitCheck 6 CommunityAffiliationCheck 7 ManagerialReview 8 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We have a loop between DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo Then after the loop we have SkillAssessment Then an XOR between CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Then ManagerialReview and then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The order ReceiveApplication to loop loop DataCompletenessCheck to XOR between RequestMoreInfo and exit So the loop node will be DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Then from the loop to SkillAssessment Then from SkillAssessment to the XOR node which is CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Then from the XOR node to ManagerialReview Then ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness We remove the CommunityAffiliationCheck and the XOR We just have CulturalFitCheck after SkillAssessment Nodes 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck 3 RequestMoreInfo 4 SkillAssessment 5 CulturalFitCheck 6 ManagerialReview 7 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop is the same Then after the loop SkillAssessment Then CulturalFitCheck Then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Lets code accordingly We are going to create two POWL models one for each

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Steps for Model 1 A Transition label ReceiveApplication B Transition label DataCompletenessCheck C Transition label RequestMoreInfo D Transition label SkillAssessment E Transition label CulturalFitCheck F Transition label CommunityAffiliationCheck G Transition label ManagerialReview H Transition label FinalDecision loop OperatorPOWL operator LOOP children B C xor OperatorPOWL operator XOR children E F

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: root StrictPartialOrder nodes A loop D xor G H root order add edge A loop root order add edge loop D root order add edge D xor root order add edge xor G root order add edge G H

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Steps for Model 2 A Transition label ReceiveApplication B Transition label DataCompletenessCheck C Transition label RequestMoreInfo D Transition label SkillAssessment E Transition label CulturalFitCheck G Transition label ManagerialReview H Transition label FinalDecision loop OperatorPOWL operator LOOP children B C

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: root StrictPartialOrder nodes A loop D E G H root order add edge A loop root order add edge loop D root order add edge D E root order add edge E G root order add edge G H

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that in the second model we are not having an XOR so we dont have the CommunityAffiliationCheck
